content.en:
Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower.

Ye Tian came here again, unlike in the past, the current Six Paths Reincarnation Pagoda was full of supreme coercion, and a wisp of breath was comparable to the momentum of the previous Six Realms Reincarnation Tower.

"This is the real Six Realms Reincarnation Tower!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

Walking into the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, Ye Tian saw the spirit of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower.

Although Ye Tian is no longer the owner of the Six Realms Reincarnation Tower, this instrument spirit still knows Ye Tian.

"His Highness Wanfa!"

The machine spirit appeared, respectfully calling Ye Tiandao.

"I want to enter the other four reincarnations of the six realms of reincarnation!"

Ye Tian showed his attitude.

He had previously practiced with the help of the Heavenly Path of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Pagoda and the Asura Path of Reincarnation, but at that time, the origin of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Pagoda had not been revived, so the other four realms were closed.

Now, the Six Realms of Reincarnation Tower has been completely revived, and the Six Realms of Reincarnation Experiences have naturally all begun.

"Yes!"

The machine spirit responded.

"I'll go to hell first!"

Ye Tian said.

Then, the machine spirit opened the Hell Dao Reincarnation World, allowing Ye Tian to enter the Hell Dao Reincarnation World for reincarnation and training, refining himself.

The environment of the Hell Dao Reincarnation World is very harsh, and the race here is the Hell Race, which is mainly cruel and terrifying, and it is also full of killing.

Ye Tian was born in the world of hell reincarnation, born in a powerful Hell King family, since he was a child, he has been tempered inhumanely, and his strength has become stronger and stronger.

In the Abi world, Ye Tian went from weak to strong step by step, becoming a hell king in the Abi world, crushing countless geniuses, and living in this world for 30,000 years.

In the end, Ye Tian ended this life and continued to reincarnate and temper.

And just like that, life after life passed.

Ye Tian spent a total of thirteen lifetimes in the Hell Reincarnation World, which ended the experience of the Hell Reincarnation World.

If it was the previous six reincarnation towers, there would be no way to maintain the reincarnation experience of the thirteenth world.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the world of reincarnation of the Hungry Ghost Dao and carried out a new round of reincarnation experience.

In the Hungry Ghost Dao Reincarnation World, Ye Tian has gone through twelve lives, one less than in the Hell Reincarnation World, in this life, Ye Tian has gone through many tribulations, the experience is unimaginable, and the harvest is naturally great.

Then, Ye Tian entered the animal path reincarnation world again.

In this reincarnation world, Ye Tian is reincarnated one life after another, and the reincarnation is a pig family, a cattle family, and a dog family......

In short, Ye Tian has gone through the lives of many beasts, although the time spent in each life of reincarnation is not long, but it has gone through eighteen lives, and he has gained a lot.

The last of the six realms of reincarnation, Ye Tian entered the reincarnation of humanity, and reincarnation was a human being.

Humans here do not refer to the human race, but to the humanoid race.

Every reincarnation world has humanoids, not specifically humans.

In the world of humane reincarnation, Ye Tian has been an ordinary person, a general, a cultivator, and an emperor in reincarnation again and again......

Ye Tian has been reincarnated in the world of human reincarnation for a total of thirty-six lifetimes, perhaps because he is in line with the reincarnation of humanity, so he has been reincarnated so many times.

Hell Dao, Hungry Ghost Dao, Animal Dao, and Humanity, among the four realms of reincarnation, Ye Tian has experienced so many lifetimes, and the years accumulated in these reincarnation worlds are millions of years.

After such a long period of time and countless things, after Ye Tian came out of the reincarnation world, the whole person suddenly became vicissitudes, as if he was an ancient existence after endless years.

"The state of mind is only one step away from stepping into the seventh level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time, not only did his mood improve a lot, but his insight was also filled with a lot.

After practicing reincarnation so many times, Ye Tian's combat strength has not improved much on the surface, and his cultivation has not improved much, but his gains are too big.

In these millions of years of reincarnation, once Ye Tian awakened his memory, he carried out the sword path mastery and the comprehension of the law.

The anti-heaven aspect of the Six Realms of Reincarnation Pagoda lies in the fact that although the reincarnation world it creates is illusory, the laws are real, and the laws can be realized in the reincarnation world.

Therefore, Ye Tian's attainments in the law are now very high, which is very helpful for him to improve his attainments in the future.

And Ye Tian's biggest gain is another convenience.

After going through the six reincarnation worlds, Ye Tian synthesized many laws and world characteristics of the six reincarnation worlds, and combined the six reincarnations to create a trace of laws.

This silk law contains the breath of the six reincarnations, which Ye Tian called the six laws of reincarnation.

The Six Paths of Reincarnation Law is a special law, and because the law created by Ye Tian is completely controlled by Ye Tian, in the future, Ye Tian will slowly improve the Six Paths of Reincarnation Rule, and the Six Paths of Reincarnation Origin can be formed, just like the origin of the Law of the Sword.

Moreover, after creating the Six Laws of Reincarnation, Ye Tian also integrated this law into his own Chaos Law, and actually transformed the Law of Chaos, as if the Law of Chaos had become more perfect.

"The law of chaos contains everything, although the law of reincarnation is not a basic law, but a special law, it can also be integrated into the law of chaos, and it can even make my chaos avenue more perfect!"

Ye Tian suddenly thought.

The Chaos Dao he is cultivating now is created by one of the most powerful supreme beings of the human race, the Chaos Yuan Supreme, and the Chaos Yuan Supreme has not cultivated the Chaos Supreme Divine Codex Chaos Refining Technique, so although he has a deep understanding of the Chaos Dao, he has not studied it thoroughly.

If Ye Tian had been following the concept of the Chaos Supreme to follow the Chaos Dao, he would naturally have some restrictions, and it would even be difficult to comprehend the Chaos Dao to an extremely advanced realm.

But if the Chaos Avenue is mixed with some of his own understanding, so that the Chaos Avenue is more perfect, then Ye Tian's attainments on the Chaos Avenue will inevitably far surpass the understanding and attainments of the Chaos Yuan Supreme.

In the following days, Ye Tian fell into a new enlightenment creation, trying to integrate the Chaos Supreme Divine Code into the mysteries of the six realms of reincarnation, so that the Chaos Supreme Divine Scripture could go further.

With millions of years of accumulation in the Six Realms of Reincarnation, Ye Tian had countless ideas, so he had successfully integrated the mysteries of the Six Realms of Reincarnation into the Chaos Supreme Divine Codex.

this day.

Through the Six Realms of Reincarnation and the Chaos Divine Codex, Ye Tian successfully created a new Divine Codex Secret Technique-

Six Chaos Palms!

This Divine Secret Technique is a sublimated version of the Chaos Palm, incorporating the mystery of the six realms of reincarnation, increasing the power of the six realms of chaos by more than several times, and the palm contains the power of the six realms, which is enough to suppress all power.

Next, Ye Tian perfected the other divine canon secret techniques one by one, making them even more powerful than before.

Since Ye Tian came back from the Six Realms Reincarnation Tower, ten years have passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

One of the lords of Danta came to visit Ye Tian.
